modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to install Adobe Flash Player on my computer

full_description_text: 
El usuario necesita Adobe Flash Player en su computadora. Estaba intentando acceder a contenido que requiere este software. No se puede instalar en Windows o Mac.
short_description: Need to install Adobe Flash Player on my computer
description: El usuario necesita Adobe Flash Player en su computadora. Estaba intentando acceder a contenido que requiere este software. No se puede instalar en Windows o Mac.
